## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content backlog, define review standards, and approve new topics.](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Backlog:** A backlog of 13 articles requires review. This includes 9 reworked pieces (pre-Jan 9) and 4 new ones (post-Jan 16) that align with Hex's updated messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**New Reviewer:** Rachel Herrera is the new content reviewer, taking over from Jess.](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [**Strategic Priority:** The top priority is building content around the new "AI Analytics" category definition to establish Hex as a leader.](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
  - [**Topic Approval:** 10 new topics were approved, providing a two-week runway for content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=1933.0)

## Topics

### Content Backlog & Review Process

  - [**Problem:** A backlog of 13 articles requires review in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [**9 Reworked:** Articles submitted before Jan 9 were updated to reflect Hex's new messaging (e.g., "native vs. bolt-on" framing).](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
      - [**4 New:** Articles submitted after Jan 16 are already aligned with the new messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [**Goal:** Clear the backlog to enable the new weekly cadence of 5 articles submitted for review.](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [**Reviewer:** Rachel Herrera will now manage all content reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [**Definition of Done:** Rachel and Peter will codify review standards to streamline the process.](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
      - [**Focus:** Strategic alignment with Hex's voice and positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
      - [**De-emphasis:** Line edits and narrative perfection.](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)

### Strategic Priority: "AI Analytics" Category

  - [**New Category:** Hex is defining itself as an "AI Analytics" platform to solve its historical positioning challenge.](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
  - [**Content Goal:** Build a strong SEO presence in this category to funnel traffic to product pages.](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=1168.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The content ramp-up period (2–3 months for significant traffic) justifies starting now, even without fully built landing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
  - [**Assets:** Peter will share the new messaging documents (currently 75–80% complete) once finalized.](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)

### Topic Approval Session

  - [**Objective:** Approve 10–15 topics to provide a two-week content runway.](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
  - [**Selection Criteria:**](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
      - [**Priority:** "AI Analytics" cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
      - **SEO:** Balance high keyword volume with achievable difficulty (target \<50).
      - [**Intent:** Consider that lower-volume keywords often have higher user intent.](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=2070.0)
  - [**Approved Topics (10 Total):**](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=1933.0)
      - [Natural language processing in AI](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)
      - [AI business analytics](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=1973.0)
      - [Context analytics](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=1992.0)
      - [Semantic modeling](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=2018.0)
      - [Democratizing analytics](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=2052.0)
      - [Context Studio Story](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=2143.0)
      - [Explainable AI (Peter to research SERP intent)](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
      - [Machine learning training vs. inference (angle: "How to prompt AI to properly use training vs. inference")](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)
      - [Modern data visualization](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
      - [Modern BI tools](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)

### Content Staging & Publishing

  - [**Process:** GrowthX stages articles in Contentful; Hex publishes.](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [**Ownership:** Peter Ryan will take over publishing from Jess.](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [**Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
      - [**2 articles** will be staged today for publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
      - [**1 comparison article** ("Tableau vs. Power BI") is staged as a draft. Peter will review it, as this content type (e.g., "Jupiter Alternatives") is a top performer and is being cited by LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Rachel Herrera:**](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
      - [Review the 13 articles in the Airtable backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Rachel Herrera & Peter Ryan:**](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
      - [Define and document content review standards.](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [**Peter Ryan:**](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
      - [Share the "AI Analytics" messaging document with GrowthX once finalized.](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
      - [Review the "Tableau vs. Power BI" comparison article.](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
      - [Take over content publishing in Contentful.](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
      - [Stage 2 articles for publishing today.](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
      - [Research SERP intent for the "Explainable AI" topic.](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
      - [Begin writing the 10 approved topics.](https://fathom.video/share/ftPR_RY22N-1XgU8UDs1DPcyyxdQ-VRz?tab=summary&timestamp=1933.0)
